specs.title: should show error for empty fields
should show error for invalid credentials
should have a working Google OAuth button
should redirect to login when not authenticated
should ensure merchant account exists and can login
should complete checkout with valid data
should sanitize XSS in form inputs
should handle SQL injection attempts gracefully
should verify cart total cannot be client-side manipulated
